title: Normalized Evidence Record
description: Normalized macOS telemetry evidence extracted from a single raw artifact.

event_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp if present in the artifact or provided metadata.

source_file.description: Filename of the raw evidence artifact, if known.

scenario_label.description: Short workload label such as idle_browser, antigravity_gemini_coding, or browser_plus_local_llm.

source_kind.description: Primary origin of the raw evidence artifact.

collection_notes.description: Short human-supplied context about the capture session.

data_confidence.description: Overall confidence in the record based on completeness and ambiguity.

memory_pressure_state.description: Observed or conservatively inferred macOS memory pressure state.

app_memory_gb.description: Approximate app or process memory in GB, if supported by the artifact.

cached_files_gb.description: Cached files or file cache in GB.

active_processes.description: Short list of notable visible processes relevant to the workload.

uncertainty_flags.description: Short machine-readable notes explaining ambiguity, conversion, OCR noise, or missing fields.
